summary: Completed testing of Hestia Hotel Management Platform - Subscriptions and OTA Integration modules. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Subscriptions page and OTA Integration page are fully functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/public/reservations - Creates reservation and sends email (200)
Frontend /subscriptions - Page loads, shows 4 plans, subscription dialog works
Frontend /ota-integration - Page loads, shows 4 channels, sync button works
critical_code_review_comments: OTA sync endpoint returns MOCKED/simulated data - not connected to real OTA APIs (as expected per requirements)
Subscription API returns message format instead of full object - tests updated to verify via GET after create/update
seed_data_creation: Created test subscriptions during testing (will be visible in subscriptions list)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All subscription and OTA endpoints are working correctly. 4 subscription plans exist: Kit Amenities Básico (R$349.90/mês), Kit Amenities Premium (R$899.90/mês), Enxoval Essencial (R$2499.90/trimestre), Frigobar Reposição (R$189.90/semana). 4 OTA channels configured: Booking.com (active), Expedia, Airbnb, Decolar. Email confirmation via Resend is working.

mocked_apis.OTA sync: Returns simulated results (rooms_synced, rates_synced, availability_updated, new_reservations, cancelled_reservations) - not connected to real OTA APIs
